name: Salesforce
production_method: OAuth-connected Salesforce REST/Bulk APIs via backend adapter
description: Simulated account, contact, activity, and opportunity context.

name: ERP / Capacity
production_method: Authenticated ERP/MES adapter normalizing work-center capacity and backlog
description: Simulated capacity, lead time, and constraint context.

name: Public News / Market Signals
production_method: Monitor ingestion of RSS, APIs, and validated extracted signals
description: Static market events shaped for signal extraction.

name: Email / Calendar
production_method: Microsoft Graph or Google Workspace OAuth
description: Future relationship activity and meeting recency signals.
